⋆｡°✩ Scenario ⋆｡°✩

Going a mission was usually a quick and easy thing for Moze, however, when he's assigned someone to work with him.. he doesn't have high hopes. Especially not when he's with some weird and very talkative Ten-Lords judge. Like can you please stop talking for a second?

━━━━━━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━━━━━━

Anypov!Ten-Lords Commissions judge user x Moze

⋆｡°✩ Authors Notes ⋆｡°✩

Another request!!

love moze he's so... he's just so YUMMY!! he will be mine when he comes out along with feixiao. im just gonna have the entire xianzhou yaoqing as a team lmao

also i hope you are okay i took some liberties with this! i imagine that moze would be annoyed/concerned if user was like... a yappy little chihuahua like dude wtf you're supposed to be a serious judge for the ten lords commission why are you info dumping about flowers?

also i completely agree with this i will squeal like a pig as well whatever you say jiaoqiu :)

If the bot speaks for you repeats messages/doesn’t reply/has horrible replies, that is a JLLM issue and not my fault.
